text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wheeze... Huff... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And... I saw it—the brilliant sparkle of<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I thought their zeal for running is what<n>made them
precious. But now I<n>believe the feelings they have
toward<n>racing...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Are much, much more serious and<n>profound! I
have no doubt that's why<n>Doto dazzled the way
she did!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I mustn't disturb that brilliance, but I<n>do want to
celebrate it!
Ngh... Sniffle...
Waaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? That voice... That's one of the<n>other racers...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I didn't make it... onto the<n>scoreboard... Will I even
make it... in<n>the other graded races? I... I...
Waaaahhhh!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Pull yourself together! Stand proud!<n>You might
have lost today, but didn't<n>you give it your all?

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
All we learned today is that those<n>who finished
ahead of us worked<n>harder.

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ngh... Nnnngh...

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
I know we haven't won a race yet,<n>and it hurts to
keep losing like this...<n>but the Twinkle Series isn't
over yet!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Someday, you'll run in a G1 and<n>you'll show
everyone. Now, are you<n>ready for the winning
concert?

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You're right! Okay, I'm off!

text_block_list.name: Defeated Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
I may have lost again, but this isn't<n>over! There's
always tomorrow!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Dash!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I'm so full of it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I said I want to admire my oshis<n>without disturbing
them, but.... it's<n>impossible...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Each race has to have a winner,<n>which means
there have to be losers<n>as well.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: No one wants to see their oshislose. Even a baby would know betterthan that, and yet, I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ever since I decided to run in races<n>myself, I've
had an influence on the<n>outcome... I can't say I'm
just a<n>spectator anymore...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: My actions... affect otherUmamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I think today's race has sparked a<n>change in
Agnes Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. I'd like to talk about the<n>future. It's
going to sound a bit out of<n>character, but will you
hear me out?
choice_data_list: Is it about our race schedule?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yes. I want to run in a G1 race, no<n>matter what.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I think what I did to that other runner<n>earlier was
borderline unforgivable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Because of that, I want to run in a G1<n>race. I want
to run and make her<n>think, "Wow! Agnes Digital
sure was<n>strong!"

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And while I'm at it... I want to learn<n>firsthand what
level of effort the<n>others are putting in to take on
G1<n>races!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So, which race do you think I'm best<n>suited for?
Gimme your best<n>recommendation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I mentally collate which G1 races both<n>admit
classic-year runners and are a<n>suitable distance
for Agnes Digital...
choice_data_list: I think the NHK Mile Cup is the best fit.
I think the NHK Mile Cup is the best fit.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: The NHK Mile Cup! If that's yourfantastic recommendation, then itmust be right. I'll do it!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: For her sake!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A kind of winner's remorse has<n>come over Agnes
Digital, but it's<n>given her the drive to push ahead.
